ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the experiment */,
  "bap_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of BAP in mg/l used in the experiment */,
  "d2_4d_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of 2, 4-D in mg/ml used in the experiment */,
  "total_explants" INTEGER /* Total number of explants used in the experiment */,
  "total_responded" INTEGER /* Total number of explants that responded to treatment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_regulators" (
  "regulator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth regulator */,
  "regulator_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth regulator (e.g., BAP, 2, 4-D) */,
  "concentration_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the growth regulator concentration (e.g., mg/l, mg/ml) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_regulators" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "regulator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the growth regulator used */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the growth regulator used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "regulator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "mean_callusing" REAL /* Mean callusing rate achieved */,
  "std_dev_callusing" REAL /* Standard deviation of the callusing rates achieved */,
  "callusing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of callusing observed in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistical analysis entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value from statistical tests assessing the significance of results */,
  "significance" TEXT /* Interpretation of the significance (e.g., significant, not significant) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Statistical method used for analysis (e.g., ANOVA, t-test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path or URL of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the visualization entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_file" TEXT /* File path or URL of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
